MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-11-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. MARIA BRADISH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT CONTINUES THE TRIAL TO 7/27/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR FURTHER SETTLEMENT. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO PAY $60.00 VIA E-FILING BY THE END OF THE DAY FOR THE ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL TO DEFENDANT. THE COURT SETS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. ROBERT SHEPARD, FOR APR-22-2022 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE OF OSC IS MAILED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
